CustomField.formula: IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "EM_Management_Solutions" || RecordType.DeveloperName = "HM_Management_Solutions" || RecordType.DeveloperName = "FSED_Management_Solutions" || RecordType.DeveloperName = "ICU_Management_Solutions" || RecordType.DeveloperName = "TELE_Management_Solutions" || RecordType.DeveloperName = "UC_Management_Solutions", Subsidy__c + Revenue__c + MSA_Revenue__c, IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "eMAC_Sales_Opportunity", eMAC_Revenue__c, IF(RecordType.DeveloperName = "WellnessWorksOpportunity", Annualized_Revenue__c, Subsidy__c + Revenue__c)))
CustomField.label: Total Revenue - OLD
